title: agrostis stipata
intro: Agrostis stipata, commonly known as river cotton-grass or needle bent, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis stipata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves and flowers, or by using its roots and rhizomes in a decoction or tincture.
